title: Blueno Blocks the Path
description: Usopp returns in the persona of Sogeking, joining the mission to save Robin while hiding his own pain from the crew.
scene: Across pages 17, this part follows Nico Robin, Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Sanji. Usopp returns in the persona of Sogeking, joining the mission to save Robin while hiding his own pain from the crew.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It's not a problem, because I'm sogging.

summary: Usopp returns in the persona of Sogeking, joining the mission to save Robin while hiding his own pain from the crew.
